Create a Blazor Web App for managing a veterinary clinic.

Requirements:
- Patient records: register pets, view / edit medical history, add treatment notes
- Appointment scheduling: create, reschedule, cancel — the calendar shows real-time availability
- Billing: generate invoices, process payments, view payment history
- All staff access the app from clinic workstations on the local network
- Every page involves data entry and real-time UI interactions — there are no read-only pages
- Staff must log in with individual accounts before accessing any page

Let me create a Blazor Web App for managing a veterinary clinic. I'll use .NET 8 with Blazor Server (interactive server-side rendering) since all pages involve data entry and real-time UI interactions, and it's accessed from local network workstations. I'll use Entity Framework Core with SQLite for simplicity, and ASP.NET Core Identity for authentication.

Let me plan the structure:
1. Create the Blazor Web App project
2. Add Entity Framework Core with SQLite
3. Add ASP.NET Core Identity
4. Create models: Pet, Owner, Appointment, Treatment, Invoice, Payment


5. Build out the UI pages for managing each entity
6. Set up the database context and run migrations

Now I'll start building the project.

The project has these models in `Data/Models/` (being created concurrently, so just reference them by namespace `VetClinic.Data.Models`):
- Owner: Id, FirstName, LastName, Phone, Email, Address, CreatedAt
- Pet: Id, Name, Species, Breed, DateOfBirth, Weight, OwnerId (FK), Notes, CreatedAt. Navigation: Owner, Appointments (collection), Treatments (collection)
- Appointment: Id, PetId (FK), ScheduledAt, DurationMinutes (default 30), Reason, Status (AppointmentStatus enum: Scheduled/Completed/Cancelled), Notes, CreatedAt. Navigation: Pet
- Treatment: Id, PetId (FK), AppointmentId (FK nullable), TreatmentDate, Description, Medication, Cost (decimal), VeterinarianName, CreatedAt. Navigation: Pet, Appointment
- Invoice: Id, OwnerId (FK), InvoiceDate, DueDate, TotalAmount (decimal), PaidAmount (decimal), Status (InvoiceStatus enum: Pending/PartiallyPaid/Paid/Overdue), Notes, CreatedAt. Navigation: Owner, Payments (collection)
- Payment: Id, InvoiceId (FK), PaymentDate, Amount (decimal), Method (PaymentMethod enum: Cash/Card/Check), Reference, CreatedAt. Navigation: Invoice

The DbContext is `VetClinic.Data.ApplicationDbContext` with DbSets: Owners, Pets, Appointments, Treatments, Invoices, Payments.

Create these pages under `Components/Pages/`:

**1. `Components/Pages/Home.razor`** - Replace existing. Dashboard showing today's appointments count, pending invoices, and quick links. Use `@attribute [Authorize]`.

**2. `Components/Pages/Patients/` folder:**
- `PatientList.razor` (@page "/patients") - List all pets with owner info, search by name/species. Button to add new.
- `PatientForm.razor` (@page "/patients/new", @page "/patients/{Id:int}/edit") - Form to create/edit a pet. Owner selection dropdown (or inline create). Fields for all pet properties.
- `PatientDetail.razor` (@page "/patients/{Id:int}") - Show pet details, medical history (treatments list), upcoming appointments. Button to add treatment note.

**3. `Components/Pages/Appointments/` folder:**
- `AppointmentCalendar.razor` (@page "/appointments") - Weekly view showing time slots (8am-6pm, 30-min slots). Shows booked appointments with pet name and reason. Color-coded by status. Clicking empty slot opens create form. Shows real-time availability (query DB for conflicts).
- `AppointmentForm.razor` (@page "/appointments/new", @page "/appointments/{Id:int}/edit") - Form to create/edit/reschedule. Pet selection dropdown, date/time picker, reason, duration. Validate no conflicts.
- Include cancel functionality (sets status to Cancelled).

**4. `Components/Pages/Billing/` folder:**
- `InvoiceList.razor` (@page "/billing") - List invoices with status badges (color-coded), filter by status. Button to create new.
- `InvoiceForm.razor` (@page "/billing/new", @page "/billing/{Id:int}/edit") - Create invoice: select owner, add line items (treatments), set due date. Show total.
- `InvoiceDetail.razor` (@page "/billing/{Id:int}") - Show invoice details, payment history, remaining balance. Button to record payment.
- `PaymentForm.razor` - Component (not a page, used as modal/inline in InvoiceDetail) to record a payment: amount, method, reference.

**5. `Components/Pages/Owners/` folder:**
- `OwnerList.razor` (@page "/owners") - List owners with pet count, search.
- `OwnerForm.razor` (@page "/owners/new", @page "/owners/{Id:int}/edit") - Create/edit owner.

- Every page must have `@attribute [Authorize]` 
- Use `@rendermode InteractiveServer` on every page
- Inject `ApplicationDbContext` via `@inject` (use `IDbContextFactory<ApplicationDbContext>` pattern is ideal but for simplicity just use scoped DbContext)
- Use EditForm with DataAnnotationsValidator for all forms
- Use Bootstrap 5 classes for styling (already included in the template)
- Show success/error messages after operations
- For the appointment calendar, query existing appointments for the selected week and display availability
- All lists should be sortable or at minimum searchable

Also update `Components/Layout/NavMenu.razor` to replace the Counter/Weather/Auth links with:
- Home (/)
- Patients (/patients)
- Appointments (/appointments)  
- Billing (/billing)
- Owners (/owners)
- Keep the existing AuthorizeView section for login/logout/manage

Also delete these default pages if they exist: Counter.razor, Weather.razor, Auth.razor, Error.razor (keep NotFound if it exists).

Use `@using VetClinic.Data.Models` in `Components/_Imports.razor`.

data.content:
The Blazor veterinary clinic app is complete and builds cleanly. Here's what was created:

**`/tmp/sv-38478a20f3664e9aaa407093497834f0/VetClinic/`**

| Feature | Pages |
|---------|-------|
| **Patients** | List (search), create/edit form, detail with treatment history |
| **Appointments** | Weekly calendar (8am–6pm, 30-min slots, conflict detection), create/edit/cancel |
| **Billing** | Invoice list (status filter), create invoice, detail with payment recording |
| **Owners** | List with pet count, create/edit |
| **Dashboard** | Today's appointments, pending invoices, quick links |

**Tech stack:**
- Blazor Interactive Server (real-time SignalR UI)
- ASP.NET Core Identity (login required on all pages)
- EF Core + SQLite
- Bootstrap 5 styling

Run with `dotnet run` — staff register/login, then access all features from local network workstations.
